subject: Snubbull, a small pink bulldog-like Pokemon with an oversized wrinkled face, sitting in a grassy outdoor setting
description: A small stocky creature with a very large round pink face, prominent jowls, and a wide downturned mouth sits in a grassy outdoor environment. Small horn-like protrusions emerge from the top of the head. The body is compact and roughly cylindrical, with short visible limbs. The face dominates the composition, giving the figure an exaggerated, almost comical expression despite the drooping features. The background shows an open landscape with rolling hills and a soft sky, the palette warm and light.
foreground: small stocky pink creature with enormous wrinkled jowly face and downturned mouth, sitting in grass
background: open grassy hillside with soft sky
emotion: grumpy and sulky; the large drooping face reads as permanently displeased
